title: Declassified Pentagon UFO files detail mysterious 1947 incident in New Hampshire
description: The Pentagon released over a hundred newly declassified files related to UFOs (now officially referred to as Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena, or UAP) last month, including a handful of pages and memos about mysterious, flaming metal fragments that landed in a field in West Rindge, New Hampshire, in 1947, and the classified investigation that followed. title: At the Disclosure Forum with Anna Paulina Luna and a Room Full of UFO Enthusiasts
description: Vanity Fair reports from the Capitol Hill conference, where members of a sprawling community of national security experts and alien conspiracists gathered to celebrate how far they’ve come.

title: 'Not a Natural Phenomenon': Venezuela Earthquake Sparks UFO Theory After 'Red Energy Beams' Were Seen Before Disaster
description: Viral videos showing red beams before the Venezuela earthquake have sparked conspiracy theories. However, analyses reveal no credible evidence linking the footage to the seismic event.
